title: Incapacitated
excerpt: While you have the Incapacitated condition, you experience the following effects....
markdown:
# Incapacitated

While you have the Incapacitated condition, you experience the following effects.

### Inactive

You can't take any [[action]], [[bonus_action]], or [[reaction]].

### No Concentration

Your Concentration is broken.

### Speechless

You can't speak.

### Surprised

If you're Incapacitated when you roll [[initiative]], you have [[disadvantage]] on the roll.
